_description: Page with multiple stacked modals/overlays (cookie + welcome + tour + GDPR). Comma-separated dismiss tries each in order, longer dismissWait for animations.

apps.name: modal-heavy-site
apps.dismiss: button:has-text("Accept all"), button:has-text("I agree"), button:has-text("Got it"), button:has-text("Let's Go"), button:has-text("Skip tour"), button[aria-label="close"], .modal button.primary
